title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 511.470 - Such liens to have the force of other judgment liens
text:
511.470.  Such liens to have the force of other judgment liens. — The lien created by sections 511.440 to 511.480 shall exist to the same extent and for the same time only as the lien of the judgment or decree in the county where the same was rendered; and a transcript of a judgment or decree reviving a judgment or decree, or the lien thereof, may be filed, docketed and recorded in the same manner and with like effect as an original judgment or decree.
(RSMo 1939 § 1309) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1145; 1919 § 1596; 1909 § 2165
